0.0.1.description: The Giant enabled, with basic "Round Completion" Victory/Goal

0.1.0.description:
Initial release after about 6 weeks of work.

See readme for initial feature list and setup instructions
0.1.0.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies Archipelago 0.1.0

0.1.1.description: Fixes for apworld, no mod changes yet
0.1.1.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies Archipelago 0.1.1

0.1.2.description:
Apworld generator will now adjust round frequency down, round max and goal round upwards to make sure it always has enough locations to fill.

The Giant - Fly Trap Quest will be used as an easter egg location if there are no other maps enabled, just to prevent gen failing.

- Camo and Reticle rando options
- SoE Apothicon Servant can be pack-a-punched  
- Reflex Reticle 39 is the AP logo
- Starting weapon now gets updated with rando settings when map starts
- WIP New ingame menu
- Fix Fly Trap and Skull Room AP checks
- Fix Revelations Apothicon Servant reverting to normal on reload
- Fix Revelations Origins to MotD door not opening when power restored
- Fix subsequent map loads incorrectly thinking data is loaded before it is
- Revelations shard eating is now saved
- Fix Zetsubou Skull Room restoration
- Lots of changes to make the apworld generate with less issues
0.1.2.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies Archipelago 0.1.2

0.1.3.description:
- Part AP items no longer delete the Part Pickup trigger, so pickup checks are now still required by the player
- Part Pickup checks no longer trigger the UI flash or voice lines.
- Prevent temporary perks being saved and restored, also fixes weird perk limit conditions after restoring
- Fix 'Clear Save Data'
- Clear Save Data now ends the game fully instead of doing a fast restart
- Fix 'Reset Summoning Key' getting stuck in a loop until you restarted the game
- Fix the Summoning Key being incorrectly saved to your hero weapon slot if you save during the summoning key step
- After a Revelations restore where the summoning key step is complete, delete the extra pickup trigger to prevent you escaping the boss arena and causing a potential crash
- Fix Zetsubou missing perk and wallbuy items during generation
- WIP Archipelago Shop can be spawned with `/ap_spawn_shop 1`
0.1.3.title: Black Ops 3 - Zombies Archipelago 0.1.3
